conjecture_title: Open Problem: asymptotic behavior of $Q(s,r)$ when $s$ and $r$ grow together
paper_title: On the product dimension of clique factors
summary: Alon and Alweiss (2020) proved Q(s,r) = (1+o(1)) log_2 r for every fixed s as r tends to infinity, but the asymptotic behavior of Q(s,r) when both s and r grow simultaneously remains open. A wide search of arXiv and Semantic Scholar found no follow-up paper addressing this joint-growth regime. The problem appears to be genuinely open with no published progress as of May 2026.
search_queries: product dimension clique factors Q(s,r) asymptotic Alon Alweiss 1905.10483
product dimension graph clique factor arxiv 2020 2021 2022 follow-up
notes: No follow-up work found in indexed literature. The open problem concerns the joint regime s,r -> infinity simultaneously; the fixed-s regime was fully resolved in the source paper. Five web calls used: arxiv abstract fetch, ar5iv HTML fetch, Semantic Scholar page fetch, and two broad web searches.
